mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_health WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user_health WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_health (user_id, age, gender, height, weight, activity_level, diet_hobby, health_target, allergy, medical_history, bmr, tdee, bmi, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{activityLevel}, #{dietHobby}, #{healthTarget}, #{allergy}, #{medicalHistory}, #{bmr}, #{tdee}, #{bmi}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_health SET age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, height = #{height}, weight = #{weight}, activity_level = #{activityLevel}, diet_hobby = #{dietHobby}, health_target = #{healthTarget}, allergy = #{allergy}, medical_history = #{medicalHistory}, bmr = #{bmr}, tdee = #{tdee}, bmi = #{bmi}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE user_health SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_health WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
